properties.value:
{ "defaultState" : true, "interactive" : false, "scanFunctions" : [ "logbook" ], "theme" : "nightar", "logText" : "Nightar encrypted data decoded.

Log 09.051.2

Ceruleum Infusion Stage 1
Trooper diagnostic
Mass 60.2 kg    Length 164
Cell structure stable.
--

Ceruleum Infusion Stage 2
Introducing compound into tank.
Ceruleum Batch 0563.P
Status >> Complete

Notes:
Subjects exposed to Batch 0563.P tend to exhibit notable strength and body mass increases.
--

Ceruleum Infusion Stage 3
Mutation initiated.
Trooper Status >> Stable
--

Ceruleum Infusion Stage 4
Trooper diagnostic
Mass 99.4 kg    Length 190
Cell structure failing.

Notes:
Batch 0563.P is incompatible with Trooper DNA. Terminating infusion sequence." }

properties.name: parameters
parameters
properties.value:
{ "scanFunctions" : [ "logbook" ], "theme" : "nightar", "logText" : "As a reminder to all, security is paramount for all field missions. This goes double for those who have been granted higher security clearances. Under no circumstances are you to leave any clearance security keys unattended or stored in non-personal containers. KEEP THEM ON YOU AT ALL TIMES and report any lost keys to your chief security officer IMMEDIATELY.

- Dagda" }

properties.name: parameters
properties.value: { "defaultState" : true, "interactive" : false, "scanFunctions" : [ "logbook" ], "theme" : "nightar", "logText" : "We have managed to tunnel beneath the ancient shrine. There is an abundance of ceruleum, as well as several artifacts guarded by statues. We are unable to recover the relics due to a strange energy field that repels us when we get too close. Our science team is in the process of analyzing ways to neutralize these fields so that we may obtain these relics. Per ^orange;Commander Dagda^reset;'s orders, we have secured the rooms with clearance modules and are making use of combat sentries to guard key areas." }
